About this item

  • Long Wallet Size: Approx. 8.1 x 4.3 inches (20.5 x 11 cm), Thickness: 0.9 inch (2.3 cm), this long wallet has a large capacity that can hold bills, coins, and cards without hesitation. Weight about 170g
  • Luxurious synthetic leather: This thin long wallet is made of high quality synthetic leather, so it can be used clean and long lasting. Made of durable material that is scratch and stain resistant
  • COOL AND FUNCTIONAL: Simple and classy look that you need for a long time. We have focused on ease of use and functionality. The card slots are visible at a glance, making it easy to put out bills and coin purse. Keep it thin and stylish even when you put it all. Comfortable zipper pulls with custom zipper
  • 4 Reasons to Choose a Long Wallet: 1. The design is easy to use and easy to remove cards and bills. 2. The free space design can store business cards, examination tickets, insurance cards, driver's licenses, etc. "Does not break, stain or bend. " Features: 3. The coin purse is designed to open wide, so it is easy to store and easy to take out. 4
  • Multi-functional and easy to organize long wallet: With card storage and spacious free space, you can keep your cards and cash organized and organized

Product description

This long wallet has a cute design with a nice design, and it fits nicely in your hands and brings an attractive and mature elegance. A long genuine leather wallet that is popular as a gift for someone special. Carefully packaged. It is recommended as a reward for yourself to work or as a gift for family, lovers and friends on birthdays, anniversaries, graduations, new jobs, Valentine's Day, and Christmas.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzes reviews to verify trustworthiness.
